hook.summary: A static reward screen with a ticking countdown timer creating urgency.
hook.visual_action: Display of blue gems, a treasure chest, and a 'COLLECT NOW' button with a timer counting down.
hook.text_overlay: HURRY UP AND COLLECT YOUR GEMS!

scene_flow: Display of a treasure hoard including blue gems and a gold chest.
A countdown timer in the bottom right corner begins ticking down from 10.
The 'COLLECT NOW' button remains static as the primary call to action.
The timer reaches zero and the sequence loops.
on_screen_text: HURRY UP AND COLLECT YOUR GEMS!
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy fantasy RPGs and are motivated by time-limited rewards.
